arts.ttl: Arsenal urged to follow Manchester City transfer example after Matheus Cunha developments
arts.sum: Charles Watts fears that Arsenal have "missed the boat" for a January move for Wolverhampton Wanderers' Matheus Cunha, in spite of recent intriguing developments.

arts.ttl: Mikel Arteta issues new Bukayo Saka injury update as Arsenal return plan takes huge step forward
arts.sum: "Yes, he needs to," replied Arteta when asked by reporters if Saka should take time off. Mikel Arteta has given a fresh update on Bukayo Saka with the Arsenal star currently recovering from a hamstring injury.

arts.ttl: Report: Arsenal ‘make contact’ with representatives of Wolverhampton Wanderers star with 14 G/A
arts.sum: Arsenal have touched base with the representatives of Wolverhampton Wanderers attacker Matheus Cunha, according to reports. It’s no secret that the Gunners are in need of a striker as the look to try and snatch the lead away from Premier League leaders Liverpool. arts.ttl: Team News: Arsenal vs. Dinamo Zagreb injury, suspension list, predicted XIs
arts.sum: Sports Mole rounds up all of the latest injury and suspension news ahead of Wednesday's Champions League clash between Arsenal and Dinamo Zagreb.

arts.ttl: FC Porto stance on possibility of Arsenal recalling Fábio Vieira this month
arts.sum: In his pre-match press conference ahead of the Champions League tie against Dinamo Zagreb on Wednesday, Mikel Arteta touched upon Fábio Vieira’s situation at FC Porto. arts.ttl: Mikel Arteta on Arsenal transfer red alert after £22m striker January bid launched
arts.sum: Mikel Arteta and Arsenal face a crucial January transfer window if they want to push Liverpool for the title and you can stay up to date with every breaking news story, opinion and more... As other Premier League clubs appear busy in the January transfer window to actively try and sign an attacker, Arsenal are yet to show their hand.

arts.ttl: Boy arrested after Arsenal star Kai Havertz and wife abused online following Man Utd loss
arts.sum: Havertz's wife, Sophia, posted some of the messages sent to her Instagram account in the hours following the match. The Arsenal attacker was abused online following the penalty shootout defeat to Manchester United earlier this month.

arts.ttl: 'It's unbelievable': Leandro Trossard says Arsenal have a youngster on their books who is actually 'so strong'
Police arrest 17-year-old over social media abuse sent to Kai Havertz’s wife
arts.sum: Police have arrested a teenage boy in connection with social media abuse sent to Arsenal forward Kai Havertz's pregnant wife. Police arrest 17-year-old over social media abuse sent to Kai Havertz’s wife

arts.ttl: Teenage boy arrested over social media abuse of Arsenal star Kai Havertz and pregnant wife
arts.sum: Kai Havertz, 25, missed the decisive spot-kick in an FA Cup penalty shootout against Manchester United earlier this month which cemented his side’s third-round exit
